title: Moderation Update - Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
The moderation team has reviewed and resolved all pending abuse reports.

**Actions Taken:**
• Banned 2 users for severe violations (spam/phishing and harassment)
• Issued 1 warning for suspicious automated behavior
• Closed 3 reports without sanctions (trusted members cleared, minor issue resolved)

**Key Principle:** Trusted community members (core_maintainer, trusted_helper) were protected from false reports—no sanctions applied.

The queue is now clear. Report any new issues via the standard channels.
